mentions.note: Recommended as short for many years; activist investor may force action/sale but nothing interesting at current levels despite memory monetization updates.
No growth; stock flat since 2022 and even after recent upgrade. Cramer only buys growth stocks.

Revealed lighter AR specs at Augmented World Expo with solid compute, but company has cemented itself as 'disappointter' with street. No credibility on Wall Street despite 1B MAU and <$10B market cap; Meta is the one to own, not Snap.
